name: RICS NRM 3 — Building Maintenance Works
description: Enables OCERP built-in validation rules for the RICS New Rules of Measurement, Part 3 — Order of Cost Estimating and Cost Planning for Building Maintenance Works (2014). Covers life-cycle cost planning (renewals + maintenance), the NRM 3 element hierarchy aligned with NRM 1, condition-survey-driven prioritisation, planned preventive maintenance schedules and end-of-life renewal allowances.
